violations.text: Various foods were observed adulterated. Packages were observed gnawed. All foods were disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2025

Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (milk) in the reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2025

Foods packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by large accumulation of droppings and gnawed foods. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2025
A dead rodent was observed on a trap. Dead rodents must be removed from the premises. New Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2025
The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2025
